content: TASK-026 interrupt done: collapsed abstraction components now render with a heavier outline and can be clicked to expand just that subgraph/zone while siblings remain collapsed. Programmatic callers can also pass expandedAbstractions. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work unless the human chooses to polish abstraction reset/collapse UX or edge-merge summaries. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
